englishDefinitions: An old item, especially one kept or worn as part of a tradition.
In the wedding rhyme 'something old, something new, something borrowed, something blue,' an old item worn for good luck.
persianTranslation: یک چیز قدیمی برای خوش‌یمنی در عروسی
examples: For her wedding, she wore her grandmother's ring as something old.
The bride followed the tradition by choosing something old, something new, something borrowed, and something blue.
He gave her a vintage brooch to use as something old.
